reviews.review_description:
I am just learning kitesurfing, and this app is a perfect way to speed up the process. It is exactly what the  description says, no more, but it works perfectly.

Also, the environment is quite detailed, which really helps set the mood.

Smooth and nice control, even without controllers. Great physics simulation and a nice environment to chill and learn to control your kite.

I like the effect of the sand running across the beach.

reviews.review_title: This app is beautiful and super smooth
reviews.review_description: Whether you use your hands or a controller, it feels totally natural and is definitely worth the price. Kite physics are perfect for relaxing without getting sand in your shoes :)
